falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index closes below 4,000 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below key support would invalidate the bottom pattern and suggest continued bearish momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: U.S. Non-Farm Payrolls report shows employment change of -200,000 or worse in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A severe jobs contraction would contradict the pattern's implied economic stability and invalidate the hold signal

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX Volatility Index spikes above 30.0 for 5 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would indicate market panic inconsistent with the pattern's expected resolution

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
